docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MARTIN B. GREENBAUM RE: ACCRUED INTEREST ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDFIRST BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDFIRST BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, STEPHEN $40,437.72 PRINCIPAL, $34,177.16 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $75,064.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
ORDER OF EXAMINATION OCT-15-2014 DISCHARGED WITHOUT COSTS PER LOCAL RULE 8.9 (E) AS TO STEPHAN LEE, NO APPEARANCE, NOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (514)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDFIRST BANK
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDFIRST BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, STEPHEN OEX HEARING SET FOR OCT-15-2014 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 514
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMETN ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDFIRST BANK SERVED MAR-22-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, STEPHEN
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, STEPHEN
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, STEPHEN
APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDFIRST BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, STEPHAN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
"AMENDED" APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDFIRST BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, STEPHEN
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, STEPHEN
